summary.lv: Datwyler IT Infra SIA meklē SAP Process & Transformation Analyst, kurš vadīs procesu pilnveidošanu, standartizāciju un SAP transformācijas iniciatīvas tādās jomās kā FI/CO, SD, MM un PP.
summary.en: Datwyler IT Infra SIA seeks an SAP Process & Transformation Analyst to drive process improvement, standardization, and SAP transformation initiatives across Finance, Sales, Materials Management, and Production Planning domains.
